\tzpentry{ID4210}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4210 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} h_{\mu\nu}^{\text{TT}} = A_+ e_{\mu\nu}^+ e^{i(\omega t + k \cdot x)} + A_\times e_{\mu\nu}^\times e^{i(\omega t + k \cdot x + \pi/2)} \end{equation}
